## Safety and data review

- [ ] No credentials, `.env` files, Box source files, institutional data, generated packets, or sensitive screenshots are included
- [ ] AI outputs remain schema-validated and inside the trust boundaries in `AGENTS.md`
- [ ] Consequential behavior retains deterministic policy evaluation and human approval
- [ ] AWS resources, IAM changes, retention, cost, and teardown are documented when applicable
